stem.text: How many usable host addresses are available in a /29 IPv4 subnet?

explanation.text: A /29 has 2^3 = 8 addresses; subtracting the network and broadcast addresses leaves 6 usable hosts.

stem.text: Which two of the following are private IPv4 address ranges? (Choose two.)
The default administrative distance of a directly connected interface is 0.

explanation.text: A directly connected route has an administrative distance of 0, the most trusted value.

stem.text: Refer to the output. Which route will the router use to forward a packet destined for 10.1.1.55?

R1# show ip route
Gateway of last resort is not set

      10.0.0.0/8 is variably subnetted, 3 subnets, 3 masks
C        10.1.1.0/24 is directly connected, GigabitEthernet0/0
O        10.1.1.0/26 [110/2] via 10.4.4.1, GigabitEthernet0/1
S        10.1.1.0/28 [1/0] via 10.5.5.1

content.text: 10.1.1.0/28, because it is the longest prefix match
The packet is dropped; no gateway of last resort is set

explanation.text: Routers select the most specific (longest prefix) matching route. 10.1.1.55 falls within 10.1.1.48-63 for the /28, which is the longest match among the three.

stem.text: The IOS command to save the running configuration to NVRAM is 'copy running-config ____________'.

explanation.text: 'copy running-config startup-config' writes the active config to NVRAM so it survives a reload.

stem.text: Place the stages of the TCP three-way handshake and connection setup in the order they occur.

explanation.text: TCP establishes a connection with SYN, SYN-ACK, ACK before any data is exchanged.
